page_metadata.biotools__summary: The NP-MRD is a freely available cloud-based, user-friendly, FAIR electronic database. NP-MRD accepts NMR data and associated metadata from newly undertaken NP studies.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The NP-MRD is a freely available cloud-based, user-friendly, FAIR electronic database. NP-MRD accepts NMR data and associated metadata from newly undertaken NP studies.
